message:
Strip leading hyphens from dot-dir suffixes and filter .worktrees dirs

Fixes two issues in multi-user project discovery:
1. Prefix matching suffix now strips leading hyphens from dot-directory
   encoding (e.g. --clank suffix becomes "clank" not "-clank")
2. Directories containing --worktrees (git worktree checkouts) are
   filtered out entirely — they belong to the parent project

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
